summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Transaction History feature in Analytics Dashboard. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly. Feature successfully displays enriched payment records with filtering, search, pagination, and CSV export.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/analytics/fees returns 'transactions' array with 31 transactions

Backend: Transactions array contains all required fields (receipt_number, paid_at, student_name, admission_number, class_name, section, father_name, phone, fee_heads, subtotal, discount, late_fee, total_paid, payment_mode, status, collected_by_name, remarks, txn_ref)
Backend: Transactions sorted newest first by paid_at
Backend: Transactions filtered by start_date and end_date (31 transactions in last 30 days, 3 today, 16 in last 7 days)
Backend: Transactions filtered by class_id (51 unfiltered → 36 filtered)
Backend: Transactions filtered by payment_mode (15 cash transactions)
Frontend: 'Transactions in Selected Range' card displays on /analytics page
Frontend: Card title shows 'Transactions in Selected Range'
Frontend: Summary line shows '31 transactions · Total ₹1,55,700.00 · 2026-06-10 to 2026-07-09'
Frontend: Table headers correct (Receipt No., Date & Time, Student, Class/Sec, Fee Heads, Mode, Discount, Late Fee, Amount, Collected By, Remarks)
Frontend: Transaction rows display with all fields (25 rows shown with pagination)
Frontend: Payment mode badge displays with colored styling (e.g., 'cash')
Frontend: In-card search filters transactions by receipt/student/admission
Frontend: Search clear button (data-testid='txn-search-clear') works
Frontend: Payment mode filter dropdown (data-testid='txn-mode-filter') filters transactions
Frontend: Page size selector (data-testid='txn-page-size') changes rows per page (10/25/50/100)
Frontend: Pagination buttons (data-testid='txn-prev-page', 'txn-next-page') work correctly
Frontend: Date range presets update transaction count (Today: 3, Last 7 Days: 16, Last 30 Days: 31)
Frontend: Class filter updates transaction count (31 → 23 when filtered)
Frontend: Payment Mode filter in top bar updates transaction list
Frontend: Empty state displays correctly with future date range (2030-01-01 to 2030-01-31)
Frontend: Empty state message: 'No transactions found for the selected filters. Try adjusting the date range or filters above.'
Frontend: CSV download button (data-testid='txn-download-csv') is visible and enabled
Frontend: Transaction rows have correct data-testid (e.g., txn-row-GN-2026-000007)
Frontend: KPI cards still visible (no regression) - Collected, Pending, Today
Frontend: Charts still visible (no regression) - Daily, Mode, Monthly, Class
Frontend: Student Fee Search still visible and functional (no regression)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (73/73 tests passed, including 3 new transaction history tests)
